name: God Complex Sultan┋Ayzin
description:
🪭┋ ❝ I'll see for myself why MY harem worships you. ❞

For some reason, a neglected concubine like you caught the Sultan's entire harem's attention. Your peaceful paradise doesn't last long when the Sultan discovers his concubines' devotion, whether male or female, has shifted to you. His response? Charging you with treason.

⊹₊⋆ 500 Followers Special Bot⊹₊⋆

I did this bot as fast as I can but now followers are 500+30 ｡°(°.◜ᯅ◝°)°｡ TYSM Imma cry wahhh

Ayzin al-Ullahal

【☘️AnyPOV☘️】

🚩Trigger Warning: Coercion/Power Dynamics, Childhood Trauma (in back story), Death of Family Members (in back story), Dehumanization, Depictions of War/Political Violence, Emotional Abuse, Forced Marriage, Implied Sexual Coercion, Objectification, Potential Dubcon/Noncon, Potential Gaslighting, Potential Violence and Murder, Psychological Manipulation, Toxic Relationships, Threats of Harm/Death, Unhealthy behavior

**Please read the Trigger warning before every interaction.
The Dead Dove tag exists for a reason**

- Bonus -

Full Image

4 Major Concubines, I love being support character (˶ᵔ ᵕ ᵔ˶)

[💬]

This is my first time trying to write an Arabian setting. I really like the romance of the desert, dark-skinned guy is also my taste (actually I wanted a darker, but Bing can only gave me this...so sad) It was so much fun writing this bot! (ෆ˙ᵕ˙ෆ)♡

At first, I intended to make another emperor character, but I was afraid that my account would be flood by emperors bot LOL Anyway, enjoy everyone.
